title: Market Intelligence & Category Strategy Lead (m/w/d)
bonus_skills: BI tools (Power BI, Marketo, Google Analytics)
matched_skills: BI tools (Power BI PL-300 certified, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio)
consulting background (student consulting at VfB Stuttgart)
missing_skills: coffee or beverage equipment domain knowledge
core_responsibilities: Develop and manage a comprehensive market intelligence strategy aligned with global stakeholders
Analyze market trends, competitive landscapes, and customer insights; translate into actionable strategic recommendations for senior leadership
Build and maintain qualitative and quantitative databases on consumers, customers, markets, and competitors
Define and implement methodologies for market sizing, market share, and growth analysis across key product segments
Collaborate cross-functionally with product management, sales, digital, and service teams to define and drive action plans
recommended_emphasis: Highlight market intelligence and competitive analysis work at ECE Group and IPC
Emphasize C-level data storytelling and stakeholder management from HSBC PMO role
Showcase market sizing, segmentation, and benchmarking frameworks built at ECE Group
Lead with Power BI PL-300 certification and BI tooling breadth as a bonus differentiator
Position student consulting at VfB Stuttgart as evidence of consulting background
Call out multi-market experience (EMEA, APAC) to reinforce international environment fit
Mention German language (B1+) as a beneficial asset per JD
